footer.tagline: The marketplace where real businesses change hands with transparency and criteria.
footer.disclaimerText: buscobusiness.com is an advertising platform (marketplace) that facilitates contact between buyers and sellers of businesses. We do not act as intermediaries, advisors or brokers in transactions, unless expressly indicated otherwise in specific contracted services. Each user is responsible for verifying published information and conducting relevant legal, tax and financial checks before any transaction.
footer.designedFor: Designed for entrepreneurs and business owners looking for real opportunities.

laborda.title: La Borda – Oldest Restaurant in Andorra
laborda.description: Emblematic restaurant with over 45 years of history. Traditional Andorran cuisine in a rustic and cozy atmosphere with fireplace. Loyal and consolidated clientele. Growth possibility with outdoor terrace.

history.label: years of history as the oldest restaurant in Andorra

alpine.title: Alpine Security – Cybersecurity Company
alpine.description: Leading cybersecurity company with operations in Andorra and Spain. Product/service portfolio: 1.3M in Contracts (86% Threat Hunting, 9% Consulting and 5% Offensive Cybersecurity). Alpine has exceeded revenue and client portfolio forecasts.
alpine.carouselDesc: Cybersecurity Company (Andorra and Spain) · Revenue €1.3M · EBITDA €300k · Profitability 18%
highlights: Leader in cybersecurity in Andorra and Spain
Technical team with 20 years of experience

endpoints.label: endpoints protected 24x7x365 by our Threat Hunting Services

experience.label: years of combined experience in cybersecurity

infinitypay.title: InfinityPay – Payment Solutions Company
infinitypay.description: Payment solutions company with payment gateway, POS terminals and security solutions. With 99% annual recurrence and a fleet of over 2000 POS units with 90% of the country's large companies integrated.
infinitypay.carouselDesc: Payment gateway, POS terminals · Revenue €500k · EBITDA €200k · Profitability 19%

tpvs.label: POS terminals installed with 90% of large companies integrated
